recommendations.title: A Prince for Christmas
recommendations.overview: A prince from Europe meets a charming waitress when he travels to America during the Christmas holiday to escape an arranged marriage.

recommendations.title: Shock Waves
recommendations.overview: Visitors to a remote island discover that a reclusive Nazi commandant has been breeding a group of zombie soldiers.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: 12 Strong
recommendations.overview: A team of special forces head into Afghanistan in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks in an attempt to dismantle the Taliban.

recommendations.title: The Breadwinner
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young girl in Afghanistan, ruled by the Taliban, disguises herself as a boy in order to provide for her family.

recommendations.overview: During the war in Afghanistan, a local interpreter risks his own life to carry an injured sergeant across miles of grueling terrain.

recommendations.title: The Wall
recommendations.overview: An American sniper and his spotter engage in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with an Iraqi sniper.
